series_metadata.series_description: Records include petitions to establish child support cases on behalf of other states under the Uniform Interstate Family Support Act (UIFSA) and status inquiries for processing interstate child support cases. Information is entered into the Statewide Enforcement Tracking System (SETS) and then the records are sent to the county agency responsible for administering the case.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 30-days after imaging and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 1 year, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
